title: Fabrication Projects
bullets: Neural Probe: Neural probes made of deposited Chromium and Gold on a Silicon wafer
Pressure Sensor: Chromium and Gold Pressure Sensors on a Silicon wafer getting wet etched in a beaker of Potassium Hydroxide

title: Boeing Freshman Design Challenge
bullets: Created an aircraft design pitch for asteroid sample retrieval in the Boeing Freshman Design Challenge hosted at USC.
Presented design to panel of Boeing engineers; placed 4th overall in which top 5 teams present designs.

title: Canvas Final Grade Calculator
bullets: Web extension that fetches your Canvas grade and calculates the final exam score needed for your desired grade.
Received 900+ downloads on Chrome Web Store.
